desc.en:
This is a map of the Bucharest Metro System (currently owned by Metrorex) made by me, Sebi_plays, with the Shanghai station style, including the M6 construction (1 Mai - Aeroport H. Coandă Otopeni-Bucharest) and M5 continuation project (Eroilor - Pantelimon).
The translations to Traditional Chinese may be incorrect due to the use of DeepL Translator to translate the station names, if you know Tranditional Chinese, feel free to correct the translations, but if you know Simplified Chinese and you think that it isn't the best idea to use Traditional Chinese and that it would be better to use Simplified Chinese, feel free to transfer the station names from Traditional Chinese to Simplified Chinese.
**DO NOT USE THIS MAP FOR REAL-LIFE PLANNING AS THERE ARE PROJECTS TO EXTEND METRO LINES AND TO BUILD NEW LINES, THEREFORE THE REAL-LIFE MAP MAY CHANGE!!!**

updateHistory.reason: This template does not have any changes to the original map of the Bucharest Metro System (Metrorex), exception making the Shanghai style and stations with it's name in Chinese (Traditional).
